headline: The Week In Cannabis: New York. New Mexico, YouTube, KushCo, Greenlane And More
summary:
A shortened week came with no shortage of news.

In New York, Gov. Andrew Cuomo signed recreational marijuana into law on Wednesday, making the Empire State the 15th in the U.S. to legalize cannabis.

headline: Is Polaris Being Overlooked In The Electric & Autonomous Vehicle Markets?
summary: The growth of the electric vehicle market has produced many companies tackling different sectors and sizes of the market. A company known for producing off-road vehicles could become a player in the electric and autonomous vehicle markets.

headline: Tesla Reports 184,800 Deliveries In 'Drop The Mic' Quarter
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) delivered 184,800 vehicles in the first quarter, handily beating the 168,000 number analysts expected. Estimates ranged from 145,000 to 188,000 deliveries, according to CNBC.

headline: Tesla Reports Q1 Production 180,338 Vehicles, Deliveries 184,800 Vehicles
Attention Biotech Investors: Mark Your Calendar For April PDUFA Dates
summary: A slew of drugs, including four new molecular entities, were approved in the month of March. NMEs are drugs that contain active moieties that have never been approved by the Food and Drug Administration previously and are indicators of innovation in drug research.

headline: Ford Is As Good Of A Play As Any In EV Space, Castleark CIO Says
summary: On CNBC's "The Exchange," Jerry Castellini appeared to discuss his playbook moving forward. Castellini is the president and chief investment officer of Castleark and he was asked about Ford Motor Company (NYSE: F), which is up 38% this year.
